form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.75) at Hobart in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on February 9 over 278m at this track behind Blackpool Trip beaten 6 lengths (16.79) in a Other. Has an exceptional 16.05 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.
